data.title: Ledger reportedly in discussions with Goldman Sachs and Barclays for US IPO at $4 billion valuation amid high crypto fraud and hacks.
data.description: As per The Financial Times, there are plans for Ledger to pursue an Initial Public Offering (IPO) in the United States, aiming for a valuation of $4 billion. This decision comes as the demand for hardware wallets increases due to the surge in crypto fraud and hacking incidents.

data.title: Colliers appoints Ludovic Delaisse as CEO of Colliers France to enhance company's position in EMEA.
data.description: Today, on January 23, 2026, Colliers has announced Ludovic Delaisse as the new Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of Colliers France. This strategic appointment is part of a planned leadership transition aimed at enhancing Colliers' presence in France and throughout EMEA (Europe, the Middle East, and Africa). Delaisse's new role is effective immediately, signifying a pivotal move for Colliers in the region.

data.title: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp issued 3,611,111 new shares at $36 each, raising about $130 million in proceeds.
data.description: In Athens, Greece on January 23, 2026, Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. announced the successful offering of 3,611,111 new common shares at a price of USD 36.00 per share. The offering raised approximately USD 130 million in gross proceeds. The company is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker code "OET" and on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker code "ECO".

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services facilitates sale of David Taylor Ellisville CDJR in Missouri to Bommarito Automotive Group.
data.description: A prominent in dealership buy-sell transactions, Performance Brokerage Services revealed the recent sale of David Taylor Ellisville Chrysler Dodge Jeep Ram in Ellisville, Missouri. The dealership changed hands from David Taylor to Bommarito Automotive Group located in Irvine, California. This transaction, announced on January 23, 2026, showcases the ongoing trend in the automotive industry.
